judge_reason: Description A claims the page has pink stamped headers and punched holes, while Description B explicitly states there are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts, contradicting the presence of any visual content beyond typed text.
original_image_tags: Aged, yellowed teletype document with pink stamped headers and two punched holes at the top. There are handwritten annotations in blue and red pencil.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned teletype document from the Federal Bureau of Investigation, U.S. Department of Justice Communications Section, dated 12-5-50 at 4:47 PM, with typewritten text about unidentified objects over the Oak Ridge area and possible radar jamming; includes handwritten annotations, stamps, punch holes at the top, and an “OFFICIAL COPY FILED” vertical mark along the right edge.*
